positive: A whimsical, minimalist vector illustration of a group of friendly woodland creatures (fox, deer, badger, owl) joyfully interacting with stylized flora and glowing forest elements. The composition is highly symmetrical, featuring clean silhouettes and strong negative space, suitable for central placement on apparel. Use a limited color palette of deep forest green, autumnal burnt orange, sapphire blue, and creamy off-white. The style should emulate modern, geometric folk art with crisp linework, bold outlines, and a flat, matte finish. Conceptually, the scene evokes comfort, adventure, and connection. Studio quality, high contrast, emblem style, vector graphic, pop art aesthetic, graphic design poster.
